task_updates.executor_notes: Updated the four batch-scoped test files for the singular shot-creation migration. `shotCreationPaths.test.ts` now mocks `createShotWithGenerations`, asserts `upsertShotInCache`, `enqueueGenerationsInvalidation(includeShots:false)`, and `invalidateShotsQueries(refetchType:'inactive')` for the single-generation path. `shotCreationAction.test.ts` removes `createShotWithImageMutation` usage and expects the singular path to receive `createShotWithGenerations`. `src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useShotCreation.test.ts` no longer mocks `useCreateShotWithImage`. `src/shared/hooks/shots/__tests__/useShotCreation.test.ts` drops the `useCreateShotWithImage` describe block and keeps the external-image-drop coverage. Verification: the targeted vitest run passes for the shot-creation module and updated shot creation hook tests, and grep is clean for `createShotWithImage`, `applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate`, and `createShotWithImageMutation` in the four T2 files.

Rewrote `useDuplicateAsNewGeneration` to use a single `duplicate_as_new_generation` RPC call and removed the local helper pipeline for source fetch, generation insert, variant insert, frame collision resolution, and shot_generation insert. The hook now applies the standard invalidation pattern with `enqueueGenerationsInvalidation(scope:'all', includeShots:false, projectId, includeProjectUnified:true)` plus `invalidateShotsQueries(refetchType:'inactive')`, while explicitly preserving `queryKeys.generations.derivedGenerations(original_generation_id)` and `queryKeys.segments.parents(shot_id, project_id)` invalidation. Verification: grep confirms the new RPC and required invalidation calls. The targeted vitest run fails only in `src/shared/hooks/shots/__tests__/useDuplicateAsNewGeneration.test.ts` because that T5 test file still mocks the removed `from(...)` path and does not provide `rpc` yet.

Added post-upload shot hydration to `createShotWithFilesPath`. `CreateShotWithFilesPathInput` now accepts `queryClient`, the action threads it through, and the path fetches `shot_generations` joined with `generations!inner(...)` for the new shot, maps the nested join via `mapJoinedShotGenerationToRow`, rebuilds shot stats, and calls `upsertShotInCache` followed by the standard `enqueueGenerationsInvalidation(includeShots:false, includeProjectUnified:true)` plus `invalidateShotsQueries(refetchType:'inactive')`. The runtime keeps a backward-compatible fallback when `queryClient` is absent so the pre-T7 file-upload test can still run until that test is rewritten. Verification: the targeted vitest run passes for the shot-creation module, and grep confirms the nested join adapter and standard invalidation path are present.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. All four T2 test files were updated and grep now finds no remaining `createShotWithImage`, `applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate`, or `createShotWithImageMutation` references in those files.

Yes. `useDuplicateAsNewGeneration` now uses the standard invalidation pattern and still explicitly invalidates both `queryKeys.generations.derivedGenerations(data.original_generation_id)` and `queryKeys.segments.parents(data.shot_id, data.project_id)`.

Yes. The post-upload hydration query uses `generations!inner(...)`, the nested relation is adapted through `mapJoinedShotGenerationToRow`, and the resulting `GenerationRow[]` feeds `buildShotStats` and `upsertShotInCache`.
